misc.text: OROCHIMARU DIED!!! #NARUTO Globe Observer (@_GlobeObserver) 🚨🚨 BREAKING: Unconfirmed reports are circulating that Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu has been killed in an Iranian attack. Community note: Unconfirmed reports claiming Netanyahu was killed in an Iranian attack are false. Netanyahu is alive and has given public statements on the U.S.-Israel strikes that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei. No credible sources report his death. apnews.com/article/iran-s… bbc.com/news/articles/… aljazeera.com/news/2026/3/1/… reuters.com/business/aeros… — https://nitter.net/_GlobeObserver/status/2027932667975516639#m
